name: Kishibe - The Night After
description:
You wake up in Kishibe's bed after getting drunk at a bar.

***********************************

I haven't read buddy stories, so if somethings inaccurate, do let me know. Sigh chat. I slept in till like 2 PM today. I was up late last night doing whatever. It's fine, I just don't wanna go back to school tomorrow.

I've still got uhm... 6 more 'Night After' bots to get through after this. Then I can get to making some of the fresher ideas I've been having stored in the back of my head, some requests mixed in.

I'm glad I'm making this series of bots. But I do also yearn to be free of the shackles that it has become, simply because I won't stand for the perfect order of bots to be disrupted on my profile.

I recently picked Lobotomy Corporation back up as just a game to sometimes play in my freetime, and it's been making me kinda wanna do like, a bot based off of it. Maybe some will come on the alt account some time. As a side note: Those stupid fucking clowns or whatever won't leave me alone! (I'm stuck on day 15 rn cuz 'the whatever circus' dawn ordeal keeps showing up and letting like, shaudenfraude or porccupus escape and then like one or two important people die and I gotta restart.)

My favorite lil guy so far is definitely Burrowing Heaven. It's cute and cool in an eldritch horror aesthetic kinda way. I like porccopus or however it's spelled too. And Shaudenfraude's like, 3d thingy it has going on when it escapes is fire imo.

***********************************
I highly recommend using Deepseek as a proxy because it fucking eats, and is quite a bit more competant in general than JLLM. If anyone wants a guide on how to use it, here's a link: https://www.reddit.com/r/JanitorAI_Official/comments/1ju5vih/visual_guide_for_deepseek_users_via_chutesai_full/
creator: Asatistic
